_doc: life 축 sub-SSOT — 부모: ../_index.json (life 키). 자동 생성 2026-04-12.

_meta._honesty_note: _verified_count / _alien_index_avg: 도메인별 alien_index 소스 부재로 null (자기참조 금지 — 추후 atlas.n6 혹은 _registry 집계 시 갱신)

_changelog: 1.0.0 (2026-04-12): life 축 sub-SSOT 신설. 전체 47개 도메인 등록.
1.2.0 (2026-04-23): DIS-P2-1 low-risk batch 2 — sleep-medicine, urban-farming, gastrointestinal-medicine, radiation-biology, music-therapy.
1.3.0 (2026-04-24): own#16 registry sync — dog-robot-test domain registered (disk measured, body .md present).

1.3.1 (2026-05-01): SA applied-tech bet #5 — biochar-dryland-restoration registered (mk1 PHYSICAL-LIMIT alien-grade 10; precursors life/agriculture + life/ecology + life/herbalism + materials/recycling + physics/thermodynamics + materials/concrete-technology; physical-limit anchors Antal-Grønli 2003 pyrolysis char yield + Lehmann 2007 / Singh 2012 Arrhenius mineralization + Glaser-Lehmann 2002 CEC + Smith-Bondeau 2014 SOC sequestration ceiling + Verra VM0044 / Puro durable-removal rules; F-BIOCHAR-MVP-1..5 90-day MVP gates 2026-09-30 / 2026-12-31 / 2027-03-31 / 2027-06-30; design-by-physics per own#32, NOT n=6 force-fit). life axis count 54 -> 55.

1.4.0 (2026-05-01): SA applied-tech bet #2 — crispr-cas13-poc-diagnostic registered (mk1 PHYSICAL-LIMIT alien-grade 10; precursors life/biology-medical + life/synbio + life/genetics + life/hiv-treatment + materials/ceramics + physics/optics; physical-limit anchors Abudayyeh-Zhang 2017 Cas13 trans-cleavage k_cat 30-50/s/molecule + Eigen-Hammes 1963 diffusion-limit ceiling 10⁹ M⁻¹s⁻¹ + Mason-Botella 2020 lyophilized-reagent Arrhenius shelf-life E_a 80 kJ/mol → 12 mo @ 25°C / 60% RH + Posthuma-Trumpie 2009 Au-NP lateral-flow visual LOD ~10 fM + Piepenburg-Armes 2006 RPA isothermal pre-amplification 10⁹ in 20 min at 37-42°C; targets World #3 TB burden 450,000 cases/yr SA + 13% HIV prevalence 8.2M PLHIV at USD 2-5/test + USD 200-500 reader vs USD 10-15/cartridge GeneXpert + USD 17,000 instrument; F-CAS13-MVP-1..5 90-day MVP gates 2026-09-30 (lyo shelf + HIV LOD) / 2026-10-31 (TB sensitivity) / 2026-12-31 (cost USD 8 ceiling) / 2027-03-31 (SAHPRA Class C IVD timeline 24 mo); design-by-physics per own#32, NOT n=6 force-fit). life axis count 55 -> 56.

1.5.0 (2026-05-06): synbio canonical boundary stub LANDED — sister-axis SSOT for hexa-bio RIBOZYME R-R2 SELEX boundary. Adds canonical block to life/synbio/synbio.md (§1 Scope L9; §2 Boundary with hexa-bio: design-stage L0-L4 vs selection-stage L5-L9; §3 Handoff schema pair raw_77_ribozyme_design_v1 emit + raw_77_ribozyme_selex_v0 consume, joint family raw_77_ribozyme_selex_handoff_v0; §4 raw_91 honest C3: stub repo — no live wet-lab assays at land time, live SELEX cycle 30+). New schema file life/synbio/spec/selex_v0.schema.json (draft 2020-12; required fields design_row_ref / round_n / enriched_pool_size / top_hit_kcat_KM / hit_deconvolution_witness_ref / n6_invariant_inherited). hexa-bio R-R2 reference upgraded: 'declarative only' → 'canonical stub LANDED 2026-05-06; live cross-repo dependency live (no wet-lab data)'. life axis count 56 -> 56 (synbio slug pre-existed; no new domain, only canonical-block enrichment).

boundary_spec.scope: L9 application — in-vitro SELEX library construction + metabolic-chassis embedding
boundary_spec.sister_repo: hexa-bio/ribozyme/ (design-stage L0-L4; this repo = selection-stage L5-L9)
boundary_spec.raw_91_c3: stub repo — boundary spec + schemas landed; NO live wet-lab assays / SELEX rounds / hit deconvolution at land time. Live infrastructure scheduled hexa-bio cycle 30+.

physical_limit_anchors.antal_gronli_char_yield: 25-35% biomass mass at 400-500 °C slow pyrolysis (Antal-Grønli 2003 IECR 42:1619)
physical_limit_anchors.biomass_C_retention: 50-65% biomass C retained as biochar (slow-pyrolysis 75-85% C in char)
physical_limit_anchors.lehmann_singh_arrhenius: E_a 75-120 kJ/mol mineralization → 100-1000 yr soil residence at 25 °C (Lehmann 2007 / Singh 2012 GCB 18:2659)
physical_limit_anchors.glaser_lehmann_cec: amended-soil CEC mass-balance mixing rule; 6-30 cmol/kg terra-preta band (Glaser-Lehmann 2002 BFS 35:219; Liang 2006 SSSAJ 70:1719)
physical_limit_anchors.atkinson_water_retention: 5-15% plant-available water uplift per 10 t/ha biochar (Atkinson 2010 Plant Soil 337:1)
physical_limit_anchors.smith_bondeau_soc_ceiling: global SOC sink ~ 1.5 GtCO2/yr; SA share ~ 36-50 MtCO2/yr (Smith-Bondeau 2014 GCB 20:3270)
physical_limit_anchors.osha_kiln_safety: CO ≤ 50 ppm + HCN ≤ 10 ppm 8-hr TWA (OSHA 29 CFR 1910.1000)

precursors: life/agriculture (rangeland carrying capacity, Karoo 6-12 ha/LSU baseline, Hoffmann 2014)
life/ecology (invasive species control, Prosopis 30-80 t/ha aboveground biomass, van Wilgen 2012)
life/herbalism (Acacia mearnsii bark 35-45% tannin, Pizzi 1994; feedstock phytochemistry)
materials/recycling (waste-stream biomass-to-product conversion, EBC II PAH < 12 mg/kg)
materials/concrete-technology (Gupta 2018 1-5% cement substitution at parity strength)
falsifiers: F-BIOCHAR-MVP-1 (2026-12-31): pilot kiln char yield < 22% biomass mass → retract production economics (Antal-Grønli 2003)
F-BIOCHAR-MVP-2 (2027-06-30): 5-yr soil residence < 80% mass remaining → retract durability claim (Verra fail; Singh 2012)
F-BIOCHAR-MVP-3 (2027-03-31): N=10 farm-pair carrying-capacity uplift < 8% → retract agricultural co-benefit (Hoffmann 2014)
F-BIOCHAR-MVP-4 (2026-09-30): Verra/Puro carbon price drops < USD 50/tCO2e → unit economics retract
F-BIOCHAR-MVP-5 (2026-12-31): co-op kiln safety incident (CO/HCN/PAH > OSHA PEL) → process redesign

physical_limit_anchors.lyo_arrhenius_shelf: 12 mo @ 25°C / 60% RH from E_a ≈ 80 kJ/mol trehalose-mannitol lyophilizate (Mason-Botella 2020 Anal. Chem.)
physical_limit_anchors.lfa_au_np_visual_lod: ~10 fM analyte naked-eye LOD with 40-nm Au-NP at 520-nm plasmon resonance (Posthuma-Trumpie 2009 Anal. Bioanal. Chem.)
physical_limit_anchors.rpa_amplification: 10⁹ amplicons in 20 min at 37-42°C isothermal recombinase polymerase (Piepenburg-Armes 2006 PLOS Biol.)
physical_limit_anchors.tb_is6110_multicopy: 10-15 IS6110 copies / Mtb cell → effective 10x sensitivity boost (Thierry 1990 Nucleic Acids Res. 18:188)
physical_limit_anchors.who_tb_tpp_lod: ≤ 10³ CFU/mL point-of-care class (WHO TB Target Product Profile 2014)

precursors: life/biology-medical (TB epidemiology + clinical pathology, Mycobacterium tuberculosis IS6110 multi-copy element + HIV-1 RNA dynamics)
life/synbio (CRISPR-Cas13 enzyme engineering, LbuCas13a / LwaCas13a / Cas13b ortholog selection + lyophilization-compatible buffer)
life/genetics (28-nt crRNA spacer design + RPA primer design rules + isothermal amplification physics)
life/hiv-treatment (HIV-1 viral-load clinical context, WHO 2021 1,000 cp/mL virological-failure threshold + ART monitoring)
materials/ceramics (Whatman FF120HP nitrocellulose lateral-flow membrane substrate, capillary 30 s/cm)
physics/optics (Au-NP plasmon resonance, 40-nm 520-nm peak, Mie 1908 + Haiss 2007 size-extinction)
falsifiers: F-CAS13-MVP-1 (2026-09-30): lyophilized reagent activity < 50% after 12-mo storage at 25°C / 60% RH (Arrhenius-extrapolated from 1-mo @ 40°C / 75% RH ICH Q1A R2) → retract shelf-life claim
F-CAS13-MVP-2 (2026-10-31): TB-LAM clinical sensitivity < 90% on smear-positive subgroup (contrived spike panel 10⁴ CFU/mL equivalent) → retract diagnostic accuracy claim
F-CAS13-MVP-3 (2026-09-30): HIV viral-load LOD > 1,000 copies/mL (contrived plasmid-spiked plasma) → retract clinical utility claim
F-CAS13-MVP-4 (2027-03-31): SAHPRA Class C IVD validation timeline > 24 months from pre-submission → retract deployment plan
F-CAS13-MVP-5 (2026-12-31): cost per test > USD 8 at 100k-test/yr volume (N=3-supplier audit) → retract affordability claim

_note: life 축 전체 멤버 목록은 ../_index.json life 키 SSOT 를 따른다 (중복 등록 금지).
